# Repositories to permanently skip when the weekly sync workflow detects
# new entries in the OpenMOSS organization. One repo name per line.
# Lines starting with # are NOT honored by grep -F — keep this header above
# the first entry, never inline with a name.
#
# Add a name here when you've reviewed a sync PR and decided the repo is
# not worth featuring on this curated page (forks, demos, internal tools,
# papers preferred to live elsewhere, etc.).

BandPO
Ultra-Innerthought
